'''Kilo Squad''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Squadron/Legends|squad]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

The [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of Kilo Squad were among the first to receive commando training prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and were one of the first commando squads decanted on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
